18.summary: Lose 3 END when the ice cyclone freezes your weapon arm.

21.summary: Lose 3 END from the fall and scant evening meal.

27.summary: Lose 2 END from the cold unless Baknar Oil has been applied.

33.summary: Lose 1 END from the arrow graze.

43.summary: Lose 1 END from the reduced evening meal.

49.summary: Your Backpack is left behind in the tent.

55.summary: Lose 5 END and permanently lose 2 base CS to frostbite.

61.summary: Mission failed. Lone Wolf survives, but the run cannot continue.

actions.cause: Section 61 ends the mission in failure. Lone Wolf lives, but he cannot continue to future adventures from this run.

79.summary: Use Black Graveweed and restore 6 END from the herbs.

121.summary: Lose 1 END from the poor evening meal.

129.summary: Lose 3 END from the cold unless Baknar Oil has been applied.

132.summary: Use a Backpack Meal or lose 3 END from hunger.

140.summary: Lose 2 END from the hidden knife slash.

150.summary: Lose 2 END from the sudden cold unless Baknar Oil has been applied.

157.summary: Use Gallowbrush and restore 6 END from the herbs.

170.summary: Lose 6 END from the Helghast's surprise attack.

193.summary: Lose 2 END from cuts and bruises.

196.summary: Lose your carried Weapons and 2 END in the struggle.

206.summary: Lose 1 END from the twisted ankle.

209.summary: Lose 2 END during the night on the rock-face.

212.summary: Return to the tent and recover Backpack gear if it was left behind.

214.summary: Lose 2 END from the Kalkoth's claw.

217.summary: Lose 10 END from the exploding monolith.

226.summary: Lose 1 END from the meagre evening meal.

237.summary: Eat a Backpack Meal or lose 3 END.

280.summary: Lose 1 END from the corrosive acid on the key.

294.summary: Eat two Backpack Meals or lose 6 END from fatigue.

299.summary: Lose 2 END unless Mind Over Matter was used.

303.summary: Use the Ornate Silver Key to open the chest.

326.summary: Lose 1 END from the effort of visualizing the lock.

328.summary: Lose 6 END from the Helghast's surprise attack.
